---
title: "425 Project working draft"
output:
  word_document:
    fig_height: 5
    fig_width: 8
date: "April 7"
author: "Nicole Kamarat, Ella Peterson"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE)
options(show.signif.stars = FALSE)

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggResidpanel)
library(ggthemes)
library(cardx)
library(easyalluvial)
library(ggmosaic)
library(catstats2)
library(ggrepel)
library(cetcolor)
library(gtsummary)
library(readxl)
library(mosaic)
library(tidyverse)
library(vcd)
library(epitools)
library(car)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(mice)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(lubridate)
library(rifttable)
library(CoxR2)
library(MuMIn)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(splines)
library(splineplot)
library(mi)
library(pec)

theme_set(theme_bw()) #Prevents need for + theme_bw() in ggplots
```

## Data

```{r}
# read in data
wildfires <- read.csv("wildfires.csv")
#create a "size growth until containment" variable
wildfires$SizeChange <- wildfires$BH_Size - wildfires$IA_Size
wildfires$logSizeChange <- log(wildfires$SizeChange)

# remove any fires that "did not grow"
wildfire1 <- wildfires %>% filter(SizeChange!=0)
# factor categorical variables
wildfire1 <- wildfire1 %>% 
  mutate(GrowthF = factor(Growth),
         StatusF = factor(Status),
         Fuel_type = factor(Fuel_type),
         Method = factor(Method),
         Period = factor(Period),
         Detection = factor(Detection),
         Month = factor(Month))
```


## Missing + Tables + CONSORT

```{r}
#look at missing data
wildmdf <- missing_data.frame(as.data.frame(wildfires))
md.pattern(wildmdf)
wildmdf1 <- missing_data.frame(as.data.frame(wildfire1))
md.pattern(wildmdf1)
```


```{r}
##########
#Table 1##
##########

counts_table <- wildfire1 %>%
  dplyr::select("Fuel_type", "Method", "Month", "Detection", "Period") %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = Fuel_type,            
    missing = "no",               
    statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n}",   
    label = list(
      Method ~ "Method",
      Month ~ "Month",
      Detection ~ "Detection",
      Period ~ "Period"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%                 
  bold_labels()  
counts_table
```

```{r}
############
##CONSORT ##
############
library(DiagrammeR)

grViz("
digraph consort_wcg {
  graph [layout = dot,
         rankdir = TB]

  node [shape = rectangle,
        fontname = Helvetica,
        fontsize = 10,
        width = 2.8,
        style = filled,
        fillcolor = White,
        color = Black]

  # Nodes
  n0  [label = 'Lightning-Caused Wildfires in Alberta (1996-2002)']
  n1  [label = 'All Recorded Wildfires in Database \\n(n ≈ 960)']
  n2  [label = 'Fires where IA occurred between the hours of 23h00 and 04h00\\n(n = 6)']
  n3  [label = 'Fires with Data Coding Errors\\n(Negative Growth)\\n(n = 65)']
  n4  [label = 'Retained for Analysis \\n(n=889)']
  n5  [label = 'Included in Survival Analysis\\n(n = 260)']
  n6  [label = 'No Growth \\n(Excluded from Survival Analysis)\\n(n = 629)']

  # Ranks for nicer vertical alignment
  {rank = same; n2}
  {rank = same; n5 n6}

  # Edges
  edge [fontname = Helvetica,
        fontsize = 9]

  n0 -> n1
  n1 -> n2 [label = '  Excluded']
  n1 -> n3 [label = ' Excluded']
  n1 -> n4 [label = 'Included in Analysis']
  n4 -> n5 [label = 'Included in\nSurvival Analysis']
  n4 -> n6 [label = 'Excluded from\nSurvival Analysis']

}
")


```


## EDA

```{r}
#############
# VARIABLES #
#############

# investigate log transforming resp (size change)
SizeChangeOG.p <- wildfire1 %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = SizeChange), 
      color = "hotpink4", fill = "hotpink3") +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "size change (hectors)"
  )
SizeChangeLOG.p <- wildfire1 %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = logSizeChange),
      color = "hotpink4", fill = "hotpink3") +
  labs(
    x = "logged size change (log hectors)"
  )
SizeChangeOG.p / SizeChangeLOG.p
```

```{r fig.height = 8, fig.width = 12}
# ALLUVIAL DIAGRAM #
library(easyalluvial)
wildfire1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(Method, Fuel_type, Detection, Period, GrowthF) %>%  # categorical variables only
  alluvial_wide(fill_by = "first_variable")
```

```{r fig.height = 6, fig.width = 6}
#############
# LINE PLOT #
#############

# unfaceted
wildfire1 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = 0, xend = SizeChange, y = 1:260,  yend = 1:260)) + 
  geom_segment(size = 1, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = SizeChange, y = 1:260), 
             size = 3, pch = 1) + 
  labs(title = "Line Plot of Size Change Overall",
       x = "Size Change (hectors)",
       y = "Fire ID")

# by Method
wildfire1 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = 0, xend = SizeChange, y = 1:260,  yend = 1:260)) + 
  geom_segment(size = 1, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = SizeChange, y = 1:260), 
             size = 3, pch = 1) + 
  facet_wrap(~Method) +
  labs(title = "Line Plot of Size Change Faceted by Method",
       x = "Size Change (hectors)",
       y = "Fire ID")

# by Fuel Type
wildfire1 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = 0, xend = SizeChange, y = 1:260,  yend = 1:260)) + 
  geom_segment(size = 1, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = SizeChange, y = 1:260), 
             size = 3, pch = 1) + 
  facet_wrap(~Fuel_type) +
  labs(title = "Line Plot of Size Change Faceted by Fuel Type",
       x = "Size Change (hectors)",
       y = "Fire ID")
```

```{r}
############
# KM-CURVE #
############

# ungrouped
ggsurvfit(survfit(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ 1, data = wildfire1)) +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  add_censor_mark() +
  add_risktable(risktable_stats = c("n.risk", "n.event")) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "change in size (log hectors)",
    y = "Survival Probability"
  )

# by Fuel Type
ggsurvfit(survfit(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ Fuel_type, data = wildfire1)) +
  add_confidence_interval(show.legend = FALSE) +
  add_censor_mark() +
  add_risktable(risktable_stats = c("n.risk")) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "change in size (log hectars)",
    y = "Survival Probability",
    color = "Fuel Type"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# by Method
ggsurvfit(survfit(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ Method, data = wildfire1)) +
  add_confidence_interval(show.legend = FALSE) +
  add_risktable(risktable_stats = c("n.risk")) +
  add_censor_mark() +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "change in size (log hectars)",
    y = "Survival Probability",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# by Detection
ggsurvfit(survfit(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ Detection, data = wildfire1)) +
  add_confidence_interval(show.legend = FALSE) +
  add_risktable(risktable_stats = c("n.risk")) +
  add_censor_mark() +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "change in size (log hectars)",
    y = "Survival Probability",
    color = "Detection"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# by Period
ggsurvfit(survfit(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ Period, data = wildfire1)) +
  add_confidence_interval(show.legend = FALSE) +
  add_risktable(risktable_stats = c("n.risk")) +
  add_censor_mark() +
  labs(
    title = "Figure X",
    x = "change in size (log hectars)",
    y = "Survival Probability",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```


## Analysis

```{r}
##############
# TRAIN/TEST #
##############

set.seed(425) # run code sequentially once
wf_train <- wildfire1 %>% slice_sample(prop = 0.7)
wf_test <- wildfire1 %>% anti_join(wf_train)
```


```{r}
####################
#### Full models ###
####################

## START-STOP ##
# Original full model used in paper
model11 <- coxph(Surv(IA_Size, BH_Size, Status) ~ FWI + Method + number_of_fire + Period + Detection + Month + Fuel_type + logIA_Size + logResp_time + FWI*logIA_Size + Fuel_type*logIA_Size + Method*number_of_fire + Method*logIA_Size, data = wf_train)


## Size Change ##
#  Full model used in paper with size change instead of start stop
model12 <- coxph(Surv(SizeChange, Status) ~ FWI + Method + number_of_fire + Period + Detection + Month + Fuel_type + logIA_Size + logResp_time + FWI*logIA_Size + Fuel_type*logIA_Size + Method*number_of_fire + Method*logIA_Size, data = wf_train)

## Size Change ##
#  Full model used in paper with size change instead of start stop
model13 <- coxph(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ FWI + Method + number_of_fire + Period + Detection + Month + Fuel_type + logIA_Size + logResp_time + FWI*logIA_Size + Fuel_type*logIA_Size + Method*number_of_fire + Method*logIA_Size, data = wf_train)
```

```{r}
#################
#### DREDGE #####
#################

# Start Stop dredge
options(na.action = "na.fail")
dredge <- dredge(model11, rank = "AIC")

# Size Change dredge
dredge2 <- dredge(model12, rank = "AIC")

# Log Size Change dredge
dredge3 <- dredge(model13, rank = "AIC")
```



```{r}
##############
# TOP MODELS #
##############

# START-STOP #
# choose top model by AIC (model71) as best model (highest global p-value for PH)
ssTopmodel <- coxph(Surv(IA_Size, BH_Size, Status) ~ Fuel_type + FWI*logIA_Size, data = wf_train, x=T)

# SIZE CHANGE #
scTopmodel <- coxph(Surv(SizeChange, Status) ~ Fuel_type + FWI + logIA_Size, data = wf_train, x=T)

# lOG SIZE CHANGE #
lscTopmodel <- coxph(Surv(logSizeChange, Status) ~ Fuel_type + FWI + logIA_Size, data = wf_train, x=T)

```


## Assumptions

```{r}
#Start Stop
coxzph <- cox.zph(ssTopmodel)
coxzph
coxzph %>% ggcoxzph()

#Size Change
coxzph1 <- cox.zph(scTopmodel)
coxzph1
coxzph1 %>% ggcoxzph()

#Log Size Change
coxzph2 <- cox.zph(lscTopmodel)
coxzph2
coxzph2 %>% ggcoxzph()
```

```{r}
########
##VIFs##
########

vif(ssTopmodel)
vif(scTopmodel)
vif(lscTopmodel)
```

```{r}
##################
##Resid v Fitted##
##################

ssTopmodel %>% ggcoxdiagnostics()
scTopmodel %>% ggcoxdiagnostics()
lscTopmodel %>% ggcoxdiagnostics()

```


## Effects Plots + Coefficient Tables

```{r}
##############
##Coef table##
##############

ssTopmodel %>% tbl_regression(exponentiate = T)
scTopmodel %>% tbl_regression(exponentiate = T)
lscTopmodel %>% tbl_regression(exponentiate = T)

```

```{r}
library(contsurvplot)
wildfire1 <- wildfire1 %>% 
  mutate(shiftedLogSizeChange = logSizeChange - min(logSizeChange))
contsize <- plot_surv_contour(time="shiftedLogSizeChange",
               status = "Status",
               variable="FWI",
               data= wildfire1,
               model=scTopmodel) 

contsize

wildfire1 <- wildfire1 %>% 
  mutate(shiftedLogSizeChange = logSizeChange - min(logSizeChange))
contsize1 <- plot_surv_contour(time="shiftedLogSizeChange",
               status = "Status",
               variable="FWI",
               data= wildfire1,
               model=ssTopmodel) 

contsize1

wildfire1 <- wildfire1 %>% 
  mutate(shiftedLogSizeChange = logSizeChange - min(logSizeChange))
contsize2 <- plot_surv_contour(time="shiftedLogSizeChange",
               status = "Status",
               variable="FWI",
               data= wildfire1,
               model=lscTopmodel) 

contsize2 
```



## Prediction + Comparison

```{r}
###############
##BRIER SCORE##
###############
pecres <- pec(list(scTopmodel, lscTopmodel, ssTopmodel), 
              data = wf_train, splitMethod = "cv10")
plot(pecres)
pecres

```
